title: Section 14
content: 1The following contracts cannot be specifically enforced, namely:-- (a) where a party to the contract has obtained substituted performance of contract in accordance with the provisions of section 20; (b) a contract, the performance of which involves the performance of a continuous duty which the court cannot supervise; (c) a contract which is so dependent on the personal qualifications of the parties that the court cannot enforce specific performance of its material terms; and (d) a contract which is in its nature determinable.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 18 of 2018, s. 5, for section 14 (w.e.f. 1-10-2018).
